# Solar Center by Dura-Foam

> Solar Center by Dura-Foam is a residential solar installation company serving California's Central Valley and beyond. Backed by Dura-Foam Roofing & Solar Center, a trusted name since 1981.

## Company Details

- Name: Solar Center by Dura-Foam
- Parent Company: Dura-Foam Roofing & Solar Center (est. 1981)
- Phone: (661) 596-2477
- Address: 6730 Charity Ave, Suite 5, Bakersfield, CA 93308
- Website: https://solarcenterca.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

## Services

- [Solar Installation](https://solarcenterca.com/services/solar-installation): Custom residential solar panel systems designed for California homes.
- [Battery Storage](https://solarcenterca.com/services/battery-storage): Home battery backup systems for energy independence and peak shaving.
- [Solar Financing](https://solarcenterca.com/services/solar-financing): $0-down financing options for solar installations.
- [Solar + Roofing](https://solarcenterca.com/services/solar-roofing): Combined roof replacement and solar installation projects.

## Service Areas

- Kern County: Bakersfield, Oildale, Rosedale, Lamont, Arvin, Shafter, Wasco, McFarland, Delano, Tehachapi, Taft, California City, Ridgecrest
- Fresno Area: Fresno, Clovis, Sanger, Selma, Reedley, Kerman, Coalinga, Kingsburg
- Sacramento & San Joaquin: Sacramento, Stockton, Lodi, Tracy, Manteca
- Los Angeles Area: Los Angeles, Long Beach, Santa Clarita, Glendale, Lancaster, Palmdale, Pomona, Torrance, Pasadena, El Monte, Downey, Inglewood, Burbank, West Covina, Norwalk

## Key Facts

- 40+ years of roofing and solar expertise through Dura-Foam
- Serves homeowners across California's Central Valley, Sacramento, and Los Angeles
- Offers $0-down financing
- Free solar consultations
- Licensed, bonded, and insured
